flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at South Plains College rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.9k → $3.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at South Plains College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.3k → $2.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at South Plains College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.3k → $5.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at South Plains College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (6.7k → 6.0k).
